Our Story

Where the Fire
Meets the Flavor

Fiestas Chicken was born from a simple belief: the best chicken is cooked over real charcoal, kissed by open flame, and marinated in the boldest peri-peri this side of the equator.

Every bird is flame-grilled to order — crisp, smoky, and juicy. Our peri-peri is crafted in-house using African bird's eye chilies, garlic, and a secret blend of spices passed down through generations.

No gas. No shortcuts. Just fire, flavor, and a whole lot of soul.

Signature Menu

Crafted by Fire,
Served with Pride

Feast & Combos

Share the Fire

Our legendary sharing platters — built for tables full of hungry souls.

R349

2 x quarter chicken | 8 ribs | 6 wings | 3 sides | 2L coke | Rolls

R449

Date Night Duo

2 x flame-grilled fillets | 2 sides | 2 drinks | Shared dessert

R249
Live Fire Experience

The Art of Charcoal Braai

Every meal at Fiestas is a performance — flames, smoke, and the sizzle of perfection.

Order & Delivery

Get Your Fire
Wherever You Are

Order online for pickup or delivery. The flame follows.
